name: Piraeus Port Authority S.A.
summary: Piraeus Port Authority S.A. provides port services at the port of Piraeus, Greece. The company operates through Container Terminal, Handling Car, Coasting, Cruise, Ship Repairing, and Other segments. It offers anchoring services of vessels, cargo handling, loading, and unloading services, as well as goods storage and car transportation services. The company is also involved in maintenance of port facilities. In addition, it offers port services, including water, electricity, space management, merchandise management, and telephone connection to ships; and services to travelers, as well as rents space to third parties. The company was founded in 1930 and is based in Piraeus, Greece. Piraeus Port Authority S.A. is a subsidiary of COSCO SHIPPING (Hong Kong) Limited.
